name: amazon-product-scraper
title: Amazon Product Scraper - Price & Review Data Extractor
description: Free Jungle Scout & Helium 10 alternative. Scrape Amazon product details or search results: price, ratings, reviews, BSR, features, images, ASIN. Supports 15+ Amazon marketplaces (US, UK, DE, JP, etc.). Two modes: direct URL scraping and keyword search. Bulk processing, JSON/CSV export. No API keys, no browser extension. Pay-per-use from $0.01/product. Ideal for product research, price monitoring, competitor analysis, and market research.
